assertionResults.reason: All 16 required core color tokens are declared in the @theme block of src/index.css with the expected --color-gp-* names.
evidence: Static inspection of src/index.css found all required color tokens: --color-gp-ink, --color-gp-ink-2, --color-gp-ink-3, --color-gp-graphite, --color-gp-steel, --color-gp-paper, --color-gp-paper-dim, --color-gp-paper-dim-2, --color-gp-mute, --color-gp-mute-2, --color-gp-bronze, --color-gp-copper, --color-gp-amber, --color-gp-ember, --color-gp-mint, and --color-gp-sunset.
Focused Vitest run passed: src/ui/tokens.test.ts reports tokens.colors and colorKeys both have length 16.

assertionResults.reason: All 5 typography tokens exist in src/index.css and each stack starts with the expected primary font name.
evidence: Focused Vitest run passed: src/ui/tokens.test.ts reports tokens.fonts and fontKeys both have length 5, and spot-checks --font-serif and --font-display references.

assertionResults.reason: src/ui/tokens.ts exports a structured const manifest and the targeted test confirms complete category counts for colors, glass surfaces, fonts, radii, and easings.
evidence: src/ui/tokens.ts exports const records for colors (16), glass (7), fonts (5), radii (4), and easings (5), plus key arrays and token types.
Focused Vitest run passed: src/ui/tokens.test.ts (55 tests) verifies per-category counts and a total of 37 manifest entries.

assertionResults.reason: The glass surface classes use design-token variables for their background and border properties, and .gp-glass declares the required blur+saturate backdrop filter.
evidence: Static inspection of src/index.css shows .gp-glass uses background: var(--gp-glass-2) and border: 1px solid var(--gp-hairline); .gp-glass-strong uses background: var(--gp-glass-3) and border-color: var(--gp-hairline-strong); .gp-glass-whisper uses background: var(--gp-glass-1) and border-color: var(--gp-glass-2).
src/index.css defines .gp-glass with backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(118%) and matching -webkit-backdrop-filter.

commands.observation: Vitest ran only src/ui/tokens.test.ts and passed 1 file / 55 tests in about 2 seconds.
